title: Who this guide applies to
description: Find out if this guide applies to you.

content_blocks.text: We consider you to be a member an ADF if you are a member of the:
This guide may also apply to you as either:

items: an ADF reserves member (where you pay tax on your salary and allowances as a reserve member)
a civilian working for the ADF performing ADF related work.

content_text:
We consider you to be a member an ADF if you are a member of the:
- Australian Army (Army)
- Royal Australian Navy (Navy)
- Royal Australian Air force (Air force)
This guide may also apply to you as either:
- an ADF reserves member (where you pay tax on your salary and allowances as a reserve member)
- a civilian working for the ADF performing ADF related work.
